message: Soil shotgun metagenomic DNA is not a published exact workflow in this repository. The environmental DNA workflows here are built around air and passive wetland sampling, not soil matrices.
why_not_exact: The collection does not currently include a soil-specific extraction, QC, assembly, and annotation workflow with validated thresholds for this sample class.

message: Direct RNA sequencing is only documented here in the wetland and avian influenza projects. Generic direct-RNA use outside those contexts is not yet a published exact workflow in this collection.
why_not_exact: The repo does not contain a general native-RNA workflow spanning arbitrary sample classes, extraction models, and downstream analyses.

message: Clinical metagenomic use cases in this repository are currently centered on AMR host association rather than a general-purpose clinical metagenome workflow.
why_not_exact: The documented clinical workflows here focus on isolate AMR profiling, plasmid clustering, or methylation-aware AMR-host linkage rather than generic clinical metagenomics.
